desktop-notepad-text-1: I’m a computer science student at Smíchovská průmyslová škola a gymnázium
desktop-notepad-text-2: You can find out about me and my projects more in this portfolio i made just for you!
desktop-notepad-text-3: Have a look around my desktop and see if you can find anything interesting.
desktop-notepad-text-4: If any of the projects caught your attantion, you can find out more about them on my
desktop-notepad-text-5: If you’re having trouble finding anything that interests you, you can alwas look in the "Help" tab in the top left corner of the desktop.
desktop-notepad-text-9: I’m open to collaborations or job offers.
blender-project-1-about: This project was my first take on animation in blender. My goal was to model a super simple lowpoly character and than try to animate it.
blender-project-2-about: This is a simple blender model i made. It’s theme is Christmas room and it was my first try on realism with blender. So i tried to make more high poly meshes and had more work with the textures.
vscode-project-1-about: This is one of my first ever projects that i did when i was learning programing. This simple tictactoe game was made with C#. It’s super simple, you can either play localy with someelse, or against a pretty dumb bot. The game is displayed in cmd.
attention-card-text-2: For better experience i suggest to turn on the fullscreen with the icon in the top right corner
